name: native-command-router
description: Compatibility-first native command router with optimization plugins and strict fallback to native tools.

scripts.build:runner: bun build src/router.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/ncr-runner.mjs
scripts.build:grep-helper: bun build src/helpers/grep-fff-helper.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/grep-fff-helper.mjs
scripts.build:find-helper: bun build src/helpers/fff-find-helper.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/fff-find-helper.mjs
